nasb.text: Even all the princes of the provinces, the satraps, the governors and those who were doing the king’s business assisted the Jews, because the dread of Mordecai had fallen on them.

esv.text: All the officials of the provinces and the satraps and the governors and the royal agents also helped the Jews, for the fear of Mordecai had fallen on them.

cnv.text: 各省的官長、總督、省長和辦理王事務的人，因為懼怕末底改，就都支持猶大人。

ccb.text: 各省的官员、总督、省长和为王办事的人因惧怕末底改，就都帮助犹太人。
